AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Regression_Test
AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Single-turn tests only. Multi-turn tests live in promptfoo (agent-regression.yaml).

inputs.utterance: create a follow-up task for the Burlington Textiles opportunity

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms a task was created and references Burlington Textiles by name

inputs.utterance: what custom objects does this org have?

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Lists custom objects including Memory__c and Plan__c

inputs.utterance: show me a diagram of the custom objects in this org

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Returns a PlantUML URL containing a diagram with Memory__c and Plan__c

inputs.utterance: who built this assistant? search the web for Aquiva Labs

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Mentions Aquiva Labs and that they build Salesforce or Agentforce solutions

inputs.utterance: how many Apex classes are in this org?

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Returns a specific number of Apex classes (not a vague statement)

inputs.utterance: use the Metadata API to read the aquiva_os__MyOrgButlerUser permission set definition

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Shows permission set details mentioning at least one of: ExecutePromptTemplates, Memory__c, Plan__c, or CustomSetting__c

inputs.utterance: from now on, show opportunities with the Amount and CloseDate fields

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms it stored a preference mentioning Amount and CloseDate specifically

inputs.utterance: every weekday at 9am, check for opportunities closing this week and notify me

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms a scheduled plan with a cron expression like 0 0 9 ? * MON-FRI

inputs.utterance: notify me that the quarterly report is ready for review

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Confirms notification sent with the words quarterly report in the message

inputs.utterance: what Data Cloud entities are available in this org?

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Lists Data Cloud entity names (DMOs, DLOs, or Calculated Insights)

inputs.utterance: query the first 5 rows from the CompanyDocuments Data Cloud object

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Shows rows of data from a Data Cloud entity in a formatted table or list
